name: Heritage Collection
sourceStatus: Briefing document source; individual apartment Airbnb URLs and photos needed
title: Five family apartments carrying legacy into the collection.
tagline: A small Ostend family collection inside the larger House of Wander world.
description: The Heritage Collection is described as five family apartments in Ostend, developed with a cherished family friend and named with a sense of children, tribute, and legacy.

listingHighlights.label: Family layer
listingHighlights.value: This is a mini-collection within the collection, giving House of Wander room to show legacy and family structure.

listingHighlights.label: Ostend base
listingHighlights.value: The Heritage Collection can anchor a practical Ostend apartment cluster once individual facts are mapped.

listingHighlights.label: Data model need
listingHighlights.value: This page should eventually split into five individual apartment records or child pages.

stayStory.title: The collection
stayStory.text: The Heritage Collection should be treated as a family of apartments, not just a single listing card.

stayStory.title: The story
stayStory.text: The briefing frames the apartments around children, tribute, legacy, and a cherished family friend.

stayStory.title: The structure
stayStory.text: A later data pass should create one record per apartment, with distinct photos, facts, and booking links.

stayStory.title: The guest fit
stayStory.text: For now, this page explains the concept and clearly marks the missing facts.

amenityGroups.title: Amigo can guide
items: Help users choose the right apartment
Route to the right booking link

bookingSteps: Confirm all five apartment names and Airbnb URLs.
Create one data record per apartment when facts are available.
Keep live booking actions on the correct Airbnb listing.
locationNote: The Heritage Collection sits in Ostend. Exact apartment locations, access notes, and per-unit differences still need mapping.
sourceNotes: The briefing document confirms the concept and story.
This should likely become a parent collection page plus child apartment records later.

amigoStayPlan.title: Chooser
amigoStayPlan.text: Amigo can eventually guide guests between five apartments based on group size, dates, and mood.

amigoStayPlan.title: Data intake
amigoStayPlan.text: The next team task is to map each apartment to a listing, media set, and room setup.

amigoStayPlan.title: Host workflow
amigoStayPlan.text: This is where Amigo could become useful for operations because one parent stay has multiple units.

amigoPrompts.label: What is the Heritage Collection?
amigoPrompts.answer: It is the Ostend family-apartment cluster in the briefing: five apartments with a story of children, tribute, legacy, and a cherished family friend.

amigoPrompts.label: Can Amigo choose an apartment?
amigoPrompts.answer: Not yet. Once the team maps the five apartments with their capacities, photos, Airbnb URLs, and rules, Amigo can guide guests to the right one.

amigoPrompts.label: What is missing?
amigoPrompts.answer: Apartment names, Airbnb URLs, capacities, bedrooms, photos, amenities, house rules, review proof, and the final parent/child page structure.
